시편 29:1.content: Ascribe to Yahweh, you sons of the mighty, ascribe to Yahweh glory and strength.

시편 29:2.content: Ascribe to Yahweh the glory due to his name. Worship Yahweh in holy array.

시편 29:3.content: Yahweh’s voice is on the waters. The God of glory thunders, even Yahweh on many waters.

시편 29:4.content: Yahweh’s voice is powerful. Yahweh’s voice is full of majesty.

시편 29:5.content: Yahweh’s voice breaks the cedars. Yes, Yahweh breaks in pieces the cedars of Lebanon.

시편 29:6.content: He makes them also to skip like a calf; Lebanon and Sirion like a young, wild ox.

시편 29:7.content: Yahweh’s voice strikes with flashes of lightning.

시편 29:8.content: Yahweh’s voice shakes the wilderness. Yahweh shakes the wilderness of Kadesh.

시편 29:9.content: Yahweh’s voice makes the deer calve, and strips the forests bare. In his temple everything says, “Glory!”

시편 29:10.content: Yahweh sat enthroned at the Flood. Yes, Yahweh sits as King forever.

시편 29:11.content: Yahweh will give strength to his people. Yahweh will bless his people with peace.
